measurement_note: Size is N, the column count, with the maximum legal height M = 5 in every tier. The reference builds the 48 valid column states and their compatibility relation once, then performs one state transition per column. A correct slower implementation recomputes the complete dynamic program independently for every prefix length through N, completes all tiers, and fails by its extra factor of N.

cases.name: benchmark: paint five by three grid
benchmark: paint five by twelve grid
